chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7876 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.38665/2015. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr. Shuja Abbas Rizvi, advocate and Ms. Humaira Aftab, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Petition is pending since 2015; wherein petitioner seeks regularization of service in Lyari Development Authority. Upon being queried to assist with respect to the law which sanctions such a plea, he remains unable to assist. In mutatis mutandis application of the ratio illumined vide judgment of Supreme Court of Pakistan in Vice Chancellor Agriculture University Peshawar & Others vs. Muhammad Shafiq & Others reported as 2024 SCMR 527, Full bench of this Court in Muhammad Arif vs. Federation of Pakistan reported as P.L.C. (C.S) 93 and Division Bench of this Court in Mumtaz Ali Panhwar & Others vs. Province of Sindh & Others reported as 2024 P.L.C. (C.S) 1487 this petition is found to be not maintainable, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
